## Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue it fixes.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] UI layout change
- [ ] Label save/restore logic change
- [ ] Batch save/restore logic change

## Checklist

- [ ] I have tested that `WINDOW_OK` passes
- [ ] I have confirmed the PR does **not** include:
  - Dataset files (images, labels)
  - `.venv` directory
  - Backup or audit directories
  - API keys, tokens, or secrets
  - User-specific local paths
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed

Describe the tests you ran.
